# terrible_ibm_storage_virtualize_ibm_svc_manage_mirrored_volume (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `clustername` (String) The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Specifies the name to assign to the new volume.
- `state` (String) Creates (`present`) or removes (`absent`) a mirrored volume.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `compressed` (Boolean) Specifies if the volume to be created is compressed.
- `deduplicated` (Boolean) Specifies if the volume to be created is deduplicated.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `domain` (String) Domain for the Storage Virtualize system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter *clustername*.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `grainsize` (String) Specifies the grain size (in KB) to use when creating the HyperSwap volume.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `log_path` (String) Path of debug log file.
- `password` (String) REST API password for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `poolA` (String) Specifies the name of first storage pool to be used when creating a mirrored volume.
- `poolB` (String) Specifies the name of second storage pool to be used when creating a mirrored volume.
- `rsize` (String) Specifies the rsize (buffersize) in %. Defines how much physical space is initially allocated to the thin-provisioned or compressed volume.
- `size` (String) Specifies the size of mirrored volume in MB. This can also be used to resize a mirrored volume. When resizing, only mandatory parameters can be passed.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `thin` (Boolean) Specifies if the volume to be created is thin-provisioned.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `token` (String) The authentication token to verify a user on the Storage Virtualize system. To generate a token, use the ibm_svc_auth module.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `type` (String) Specifies the desired volume type. When the type is `local hyperswap`, a HyperSwap volume gets created. When the type is `standard` and values for *PoolA* and *PoolB* arguments are also specified, a "standard mirror" volume gets created. If a "standard" mirrored volume exists and either *PoolA* or *PoolB* is specified, the mirrored volume gets converted to a standard volume.
- `username` (String) REST API username for the Storage Virtualize system. The parameters *username* and *password* are required if not using *token* to authenticate a user.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) Validates certification.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
